## Tags
comment, chat, conversation, dialog, feedback, speech bubble, moderate, check, done, todo, complete

## Categories
social, account

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/message-square-check)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MessageSquareCheck;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MessageSquareCheck { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
